_comment: TEMPLATE for /etc/family-inc/property_searches.json (mode 600, owner familyinc). The real file holds your personal saved-search URLs (area/price/rooms) and is NEVER committed — it lives only on the VPS (SPEC §12.1, D-024). Replace the placeholder URLs below with your own saved searches from each portal. 'madlan' is optional; remove the entry to scrape Yad2 only.

searches.label: example — replace with your Yad2 saved search
